channel.title: Looking Glass
channel.description: Looking Glass — local AI research companion. Update feed.

item.description:
Looking Glass 0.7.1 — Bugfix

  • Fixed: right-clicking a project and choosing "Edit Project…" showed a blank sheet instead of the edit form

Looking Glass 0.7.0 — Tool Calls, System Monitor polish, Project colors

  • Tool Calls panel: global activity log with Current/All filter, search, and expandable result cards — see every tool Alice runs in real time
  • System Monitor polish: Ollama logo tints correctly in dark/light mode; all monitor icons are now white (dark) / black (light) for clarity
  • Project colors: choose from 8 colors when creating a project — folder icons and the project back-button tint to match
  • Edit Project: name, description, and color are now editable (pencil button in the project header or right-click context menu on any project row)
  • Sidebar polish: avatar 2px white/black scheme-aware borders; floating sidebar with clean rounded corners (no bleed); search fields with focus animation

Requires macOS 26, Ollama, and Homebrew Python on the host.

Looking Glass 0.6.5 — Liquid Glass UI

  • macOS 26+ native Liquid Glass throughout — circular glass rail buttons, floating sidebar panel, .glassEffect() on bubbles, input bar, and tool cards
  • Wonderland v2 avatars: Caterpillar (Tools), White Rabbit (System), Mad Hatter (Settings) — full kawaii/chibi cast with disc-tint colours
  • Third backdrop "White Rabbit" — Alice and the Rabbit walking, light + dark variants. Settings now has Glass / Wonderland / White Rabbit
  • Edge blur: 80pt top / 120pt bottom gradient mask on the chat scroll view
  • Alice easter egg: large avatar centred in the chat until the first conversation loads
  • Model panel separators now edge-to-edge; sidebar floats with equal window margins and a hairline border

Requires macOS 26, Ollama, and Homebrew Python on the host.

Looking Glass 0.6.0 — UI Polish

  • Scroll-edge blur: message bubbles genuinely defocus as they approach the top/bottom edges (real Gaussian blur via .scrollTransition, not just a fade)
  • Sidebar font sizes bumped +2pt across the board — titles are now 24pt heading-weight, chat rows and previews are more readable
  • Model panel: larger model names (16pt) and badge text (14pt)
  • Panel header avatar alignment fixed — no more 2px vertical shift when switching panels
  • Glass edge zones tightened: top 70px / bottom 90px with a dead-zone that keeps blur close to the edge

Requires Ollama and Homebrew Python on the host.

Looking Glass 0.5.0

  • MCP server support: any MCP server declared in config.toml is spawned at startup and its tools are immediately available to Alice — no code changes needed. Ships with MemoryCentral connected (9 cross-project memory tools)
  • Alice can now search, recall, and save memories across all your projects using semantic and keyword search

Requires Ollama and Homebrew Python on the host.

Looking Glass 0.4.0

  • Skills: Alice now has step-by-step playbooks (skills) for multi-step tasks. Ships with a deep-research skill — she searches multiple angles, reads the sources, and saves a cited report. Add your own by dropping a SKILL.md in sidecar/skills/
  • Auto model routing: Alice picks the right model for each request — fast chat model for conversation, coding model for code tasks, deep-research model for in-depth dives. No manual switching needed
  • Image paste → vision: paste or drag an image into the input bar, Alice describes it using a vision model without swapping her main model out

Requires Ollama and Homebrew Python on the host.

Looking Glass 0.3.0

Projects are now a real working surface — Alice understands the folder she's in, and remembers across conversations.

  • Project awareness: in a project, Alice knows its name, description, and folder, and scopes file/shell tools to it
  • Memory: save notes to a project's memory-bank — conversationally ("remember that…") or with a per-message "Save to memory" button — and recall them in later chats
  • Per-project default model and an "Auto" model picker
  • Sidecar lifecycle: clean shutdown on quit, stale-process cleanup on launch, and a keep_alive setting so models free memory on their own
  • Polish: right-aligned message actions, clearer Ollama error messages

Requires Ollama and Homebrew Python on the host.

Looking Glass 0.2.0

  • Persistence & Projects: conversation history (SQLite + full-text search), folder-bound Projects, rename/delete chats
  • Selectable chat font with sans + monospace pairing (Settings → Appearance → Chat Font)
  • GitHub-flavored markdown rendering — headings, blockquotes, tables, task lists
  • New app icon; contrast/elevation polish across bubbles, cards, and the sidebar
  • ⌘, opens Settings

Requires Ollama and Homebrew Python on the host.

Looking Glass 0.1.0

First release. Native SwiftUI chat with Alice, running locally on Ollama.

  • Streaming chat with a glass UI (rail + collapsible sidebar, light/dark, Wonderland theme)
  • 9 built-in tools: file ops, shell, web search, calculator, pdf extract, and more
  • Multi-turn agent loop with inline tool-call cards
  • Markdown rendering, monospace fonts, adjustable line height
  • Configurable Ollama URL, per-tool toggles, custom avatar, editable system prompt

Requires Ollama and Homebrew Python on the host.
